summary: Comprehensive testing of email system API endpoints and account deletion feature. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components for Settings and Delete Account functionality verified working correctly.

minor.issue: InstitutionRepositorySupabase import was missing - FIXED during testing

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/emails/config - returns email service configuration (configured=true, 3 sender addresses)
Backend: GET /api/emails/templates - lists all 13 email templates with categories
Backend: GET /api/emails/templates/{name} - preview specific template with HTML, text, sample data
Backend: GET /api/emails/variables - lists 25 available template variables
Backend: GET /api/emails/logs - returns email logs for institution (requires auth)
Backend: POST /api/emails/test - sends test email successfully (requires auth)
Backend: POST /api/emails/test - returns 400 for invalid email type
Backend: GET /api/account/status - returns user info, institution info, can_delete flag
Backend: Email service configured with Resend API
Backend: All 3 sender addresses configured (no-reply@, reservations@, accounts@budezivo.cz)
Frontend: Settings page loads with all menu items
Frontend: 'Smazat účet' link appears at bottom of settings menu
Frontend: Delete account page shows warning message
Frontend: DELETE confirmation input works correctly
Frontend: Delete button disabled until DELETE is typed
Frontend: Delete button enabled when DELETE is typed
critical_code_review_comments: Missing import fixed: InstitutionRepositorySupabase was not imported in account.py - FIXED
Email service properly configured with RESEND_API_KEY
All 13 email templates implemented with both HTML and plain text fallback
Template variables properly defined with Czech descriptions
Account deletion performs soft delete (sets status='deleted' and deleted_at timestamp)
Admin users cannot delete account if they are the only admin (validation working)
All UI elements have data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Settings and Delete Account features working)

seed_data_creation: Test email sent during testing, logged in email_logs table
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email system fully implemented and tested. 13 transactional email templates with HTML and plain text fallback. Resend API configured and working (emails actually sent). Account deletion feature implemented with soft delete. Test account: demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026!. All backend API endpoints working. Frontend Settings page with Delete Account functionality verified.
